Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Randolph Stein, Special Administrator (via Zoom).

The court questioned the necessity of continuing with a Special Administrator and inquired whether a General Administrator should be appointed. Mr. Stein stated that the parties have agreed for him to continue as fiduciary, regardless of title, and he is working with both sides to conduct informal discovery and minimize litigation costs. The court suggested that Mr. Stein file a petition for General Administrator appointment to avoid any ambiguity. Mr. Stein agreed to file the petition and continue estate administration in the meantime.

The court set a status hearing regarding filing a petition for appointment of General Administrator for March 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The hearing on status of close of estate is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Appointment Of A Special Administrator
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Continued To Jan-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Martin Lettunich appeared via zoom for John Burnett (child).
Randolph Stein appeared via zoom (pro per).
Andrew Kapur appeared via zoom (pro per).
Chauncey Burnett appeared via zoom (pro per).

Discussion was held regarding decedent's surviving spouse appointed as administrator but could not be bonded, that Mr. Stein was nominated by both parties to take over as the special administration, and that parties agree it's best to have third party. Mr. Lettunich stated that as soon as parties sign an agreement, that he would file an ex parte petition to appoint a special administrator, and that he is waiting for Ms. Davis to return from vacation. All matters are continued to , 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Quintalla. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Bond And Issuance Of Letters
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Appointment Of A Special Administrator
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Nov-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvette Davis appeared by zoom for Jesse Swint.
Martin Lettunich appeared by zoom for John Burnett.

The parties reported that they are still in agreement with having a neutral third party, that they are discussing it with Randolph Stein, that Mr. Stein has agreed to serve, but he wants them to enter into a stipulation and that they are in the process of finalizing the stipulation. Status on filing of a petition for appointment of a special administrator, and status on filing of bond and issuance of letters are continued to November 5, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Further discussion was held regarding the special administrator being appointed by way of an ex parte petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gutierrez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Of Bond And Issuance Of Letters
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Oct-01-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvette Davis appeared by zoom for and with Jesse Swint by zoom.
Martin Lettunich appeared by zoom for John Burnett.

Mrs. Davis stated that she filed a petition to have the bond reduced, but her client cannot be bonded due to the conflict with Mr. Lettunich's client, that they have come to an agreement to have a fiduciary appointed and asked the court for a referral. The clerk explained that the court does not provide a list of fiduciaries, that the parties will have to agree on someone and that they will need to file a petition to have someone else appointed. Status on filing of bond and issuance of letters is continued to October 1, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for appointment of a special administrator is also set for October 1, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition To Reduce Bond
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvette Davis appeared by zoom for and with Jesse Swint (petitioner).
Martin Letunich appeared by zoom for and with John Burnett by zoom
Chauncey Burnett (beneficiary) in propria persona.

Mr. Letunich stated that he filed his opposition, that he does not object to the valuation because he does not know what activities have been done by Mr. Swint and does not know what there is, and that Mr. Swint has been acting without authority and no bond. Mr. Letunich also expressed concern about Mr. Swint's personal issues and stated that he does not know what assets Mr. Swint is claiming and which ones aren't. Mrs. Davis stated that she was told by the bonding agent that they ordinarily do not issue bonds on limited authority. The Petition to Reduce Bond is under submission. The court informed Mrs. Davis that she needs to provide an amended order to correct the bond amount to $0 nunc pro tunc indicating that the $1,201,000.00 bond was ordered in error and stated that bond will then be fixed at $400,000.00.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Yvette Davis appeared via zoom for and with Jesse Swint (petitioner).
Martin Lettunich appeared via zoom for and with John Burnett (objector).
Chauncey Burnett appeared via zoom (daughter).

Discussion was held regarding monies owed to the objectors, that it should be a creditor's claim, that the debt was incurred after death, and that a private fiduciary would be the best option to take care of the assets. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernado. Not reported.
